Metadata.title: TunixLabs — One operator, shipping production systems from Chile
Metadata.description: Not a studio. One operator with 15 years of operations leadership and MIT Professional Education ML training, shipping AI-powered systems for regulated industries. US time zones, English-fluent, production-ready.

Footer.companyDescription: One operator shipping production systems from Chile. Mining, energy, tax compliance, custom ERP. US time zones, English-fluent.
Footer.disclaimer: TunixLabs acts as technical partner for selected firms. Client names in case studies refer to the direct commissioning partner, not the end-user of the software.

meta.title: Web development & vertical SaaS | TunixLabs
meta.description: End-to-end vertical SaaS for regulated industries. Apoderapp (Chilean SII tax), Speakly (AI English learning), custom ERPs — all in production.

hero.title: Web development & vertical SaaS
hero.description: I build complete SaaS platforms: backend, frontend, integrations with government APIs, CI/CD and deploy. Not landings — products their owners open every day.

meta.title: Applied Machine Learning | TunixLabs
meta.description: Classical ML + modern LLM stack. MIT Professional Education training. Real work on Dataiku DSS and Python.

hero.title: Machine learning & applied data science
hero.description: Classical ML fundamentals from MIT Professional Education training, plus modern LLM stack. If your problem is prediction over structured data, I won't push an LLM — I'll build the model that fits and can be audited.

meta.title: Conversational assistants & Voice AI | TunixLabs
meta.description: Field Voice AI in production for 195+ workers. WhatsApp chatbots with frontier LLMs. Claude agents integrated into your ops.

hero.title: Conversational assistants & Voice AI
hero.description: Voice AI, chatbots and Claude agents for real operations. No rigid pre-programmed flows: frontier LLMs orchestrated on your existing stack.

meta.title: Operational Business Intelligence | TunixLabs
meta.description: Dashboards ops directors actually open. Real data, multi-year ETL, Gantt charts, historical comparisons, mining KPIs out of the box.

hero.title: Operational BI and dashboards
hero.description: Dashboards for teams running real operations, not for pitch decks. 20-20 calendars, monthly views, historical comparisons, mining KPIs (OEE, MTBF, MTTR, availability). Real data, zero placeholders.

meta.title: Computer vision | TunixLabs
meta.description: Honest framing: capability in progress, no production CV projects of my own yet. For mission-critical CV I work with dedicated specialists.

hero.title: Computer vision
hero.description: Honest section: I have the technical fundamentals and the interest, but no production CV projects of my own yet. For mission-critical CV I recommend a dedicated specialist, or an experimental collaboration with clearly-scoped deliverables.

meta.title: AI consulting & adversarial audits | TunixLabs
meta.description: Adversarial audits of deployed AI systems. Multi-agent architecture design. Scope drift and hidden tech debt found in the first week.

hero.title: AI consulting & adversarial audits
hero.description: I audit your AI architecture, find hidden tech debt and propose the cheapest approach that actually works. I also design multi-agent systems from scratch — with 15 years of operations leadership on top, so I can tell a software problem from a process problem.

meta.title: Process automation (RPA with AI) | TunixLabs
meta.description: Automate repetitive processes with code, not with UiPath. Direct integration with your APIs and legacy systems.

hero.title: Process automation with AI
hero.description: When your team burns hours on file processing or manual code validation, I write a bot that does it in seconds. No enterprise licensing: code on your infra that integrates with your existing systems.

about.header: Alejandro Moyano Foncea · MSc Finance + MIT Prof Ed · 15 yrs running real ops

title.text: The person you'll actually work with.

about.bioParagraph1: I fix operational inefficiencies by building custom software. Unlike a traditional developer, I don't spend weeks writing code by hand — I use modern AI workflows on Claude Code to architect and ship production systems in a fraction of the usual time. My background isn't just tech, it's business: MSc in Finance, <mit>MIT Professional Education</mit> in AI/ML, and 15 years leading real operations before writing production code.
about.bioParagraph2: That's how I understand the *why* behind the software, not just the *how*. I've delivered everything from mining maintenance platforms for large-scale Chilean mining and custom ERPs for heavy industry, to engagement apps for education and decade-old legacy system modernization. I turn manual, paper-based work into digital tools that actually move the needle — no demos, no pitch decks, systems running today. US time zone overlap (0–2h from East/Central) and rates 3–5× below comparable SF/NYC shops, without giving up senior ownership.
about.italicQuote: I understand the why behind the software, not just the how.

contact.subtitle: I reply in under 24h. No endless forms.
